expiry_desc: Invitations remain active for 6 months after publishing. You'll receive an automatic reminder 15 days before expiration.
not_active: This URL is not active yet. It will become accessible after publishing.
date_preview: Important: Date Cannot Be Changed After Publishing
date_preview_rule: Once you publish your invitation, the event date will be permanently locked and cannot be modified. Please ensure your date is correct:
date_preview_rule2: If you need to change the date, please go back and update it before publishing.
terms_welcome: Welcome to AllSet! These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our Digital Invitations service. By creating, sharing, or interacting with the platform and/or the invitations, you agree to these terms.
terms_section1_1_intro_1: AllSet acts as a platform to facilitate event planning and communication but does not directly provide event services.
terms_section1_1_intro_2: AllSet provides tools for users to create, customize, manage, and share digital invitations, including RSVP tracking and guest interaction features.
terms_section1_1_intro_3: AllSet may display vendor profiles, information, and content for event planning purposes.
terms_section1_1_intro_4_li_1: Accuracy, completeness, or availability of vendor information
terms_section1_1_intro_4_li_2: Quality, reliability, or performance of any vendor
terms_section1_1_intro_5: Any engagement, booking, or agreement between users and vendors is solely between those parties.
terms_section1_1_intro_6_li_2: Payments, disputes, or damages arising from vendor interactions
terms_usage_intro: As an invitation creator, you agree that:
terms_usage_li_1: You are responsible for the accuracy of all event details and guest information.
terms_usage_li_2: You will not upload or distribute unlawful, misleading, offensive, or infringing content.
terms_usage_li_3: You have the legal right to share all data (including guest contact details) with AllSet.
terms_usage_li_4: You will not use the platform for spam, mass unsolicited messaging, or unauthorized commercial use.
terms_enforcement_text: AllSet reserves the right to suspend or remove any invitation or account without refund if it violates these rules.
terms_section3_intro: When interacting with an AllSet invitation, you agree to:
terms_section3_li_2: Not send spam, abusive, or inappropriate responses.
terms_section3_li_3: Not attempt unauthorized access to invitations not intended for you.
terms_section3_li_4: Not submit automated, duplicate, or disruptive responses.
terms_may: We may restrict or block access for users who violate these terms.
terms_section4_li_2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
terms_section4_li_3: AllSet may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms_section5_li_1: All templates, designs, branding, and platform features are owned by AllSet.
terms_section5_li_2: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use them for personal or business event purposes.
terms_section5_li_3: You may not copy, modify, distribute, or resell any part of the platform or designs without permission
terms_section6_li_1: Certain templates or features may be paid and will be clearly priced.
terms_section6_li_2: All purchases are non-refundable, except where required by law.
terms_promo_li_1: Promo codes may be offered for discounts or special access.
terms_promo_li_2: Promo codes must be used within their validity period.
terms_promo_li_3: Promo codes cannot be exchanged for cash.
terms_promo_li_4: Promo codes may be limited to one use per user unless stated otherwise.
terms_promo_li_5: AllSet reserves the right to cancel or modify promo campaigns at any time.
terms_ref_li_1: AllSet may offer referral or “Refer a Friend” programs.
terms_ref_li_2: Rewards (if applicable): Are subject to specific campaign rules.
terms_ref_li_3: Rewards (if applicable): May require successful sign-up or purchase by the referred user.
terms_ref_li_4: Abuse of referral systems (fake accounts, self-referrals, etc.) may result in disqualification and account suspension.
terms_section7_li_1: Invitations remain active for 6 months after creation. However, in certain cases, we can let the invitations live longer.
terms_section7_li_2: After expiration: Invitation links may no longer be accessible.
terms_section7_li_3: After expiration: RSVP data and guest information may be deleted or anonymized.
terms_section7_li_4: Users are responsible for exporting or saving important data before expiration.
terms_section8_li_1: AllSet processes user and guest data solely to provide invitation and RSVP services.
terms_section8_li_2: By using the platform, you consent to: Collection and use of data necessary for service functionality.
terms_section8_li_3: By using the platform, you consent to: Sharing invitations with intended recipients.
terms_section8_li_4: Users must ensure they have permission to share guest contact details.
terms_section9_li_1: We aim to provide a reliable service but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.
terms_section9_li_2: Features may be updated, modified, or discontinued at any time without prior notice.
terms_section10_li_1: AllSet provides services “as is” and “as available.”
terms_section10_li_2: We are not responsible for: Event cancellations or changes
terms_section10_li_3: We are not responsible for: Guest no-shows or miscommunication
terms_section10_li_4: We are not responsible for: Loss of data due to expiration or technical issues
terms_section10_li_5: To the fullest extent permitted by law, AllSet’s liability is limited to the amount paid (if any) for the service.
terms_section11_li_1: Use the platform for illegal activities
terms_section11_li_2: Attempt to hack, disrupt, or reverse-engineer the system
terms_section11_li_3: Use automated tools (bots) to manipulate invitations or responses
terms_section12_intro: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia.
terms_section13_intro: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
legal_understand: . I understand that the invitation date cannot be changed after publishing and that my invitation will expire 6 months after publication.
choose_one_desc: Each invitation is carefully crafted so you feel like you’re sending a piece of art to your guests.
choose_two_title: Guest list management directly on the platform
choose_two_desc: Easily manage and download your guest list in the required format
choose_three_desc: Guests can view and respond to the invitation on their phone, computer, or tablet
choose_four_desc: All invitations are available in Armenian, English, and Russian. You can choose one or multiple languages at no extra cost
choose_five_title: Share event photos with your guests with one click
choose_five_desc: After the event, share your photos directly inside the invitation
create_title: Create your wedding invitation yourself — in just 5 minutes
create_subtitle: Simply follow a few easy steps
create_one_desc: Select one of our signature designs and choose a color palette
create_two_desc: Add the event date, agenda, photos. Edit texts, choose invitation languages, and more
footer_about: AllSet was created to transform the entire event planning experience in Armenia. Our vision is to become a complete digital assistant for events, where everything is possible on one platform — fast, beautiful, and stress-free.
plan_title:
Start planning
Your unforgettable day with us —
plan_desc: Every beautiful story begins with an invitation. On the Allset event planning platform, creating invitations becomes an easy and enjoyable process. Create your digital invitation — without unnecessary hassle…
plan_desc_two: Special offers — tailored to your choice
plan_desc_three: Our invitations are designed to combine modern trends with wedding elegance, creating a unique design for every couple.
choose_desc_two: Our story began with a simple and sincere meeting, which over time became the most important decision of our lives. Every smile, every conversation, and every moment spent together brought us closer to each other. We learned to listen, understand, and support one another, sharing both joys and challenges. Today, with love and confidence, we begin a new chapter of our lives hand in hand. For us, family means warmth, respect, and memories created together. We are happy to share this beautiful day of our lives with you, in the presence of our loved ones and friends, because your love and support are our greatest strength.
story_title: Beautiful stories begin with an invitation.
faqs_description: Find quick answers to the most common questions related to creation and receiving.
available_description: AllSet was created to transform the entire event planning experience in Armenia. Our vision is to become a complete digital assistant for events, where everything is possible on one platform — fast, beautiful, and stress-free.
available_one_desc: Create a personalized digital invitation without unnecessary hassle.
available_two_desc: Edit colors, texts, and languages — even after the invitation is activated.
available_three_desc: After sending invitations, manage your guest list with ease.
feedback: A little love from our clients
feature_one_desc: From venues to photographers, planners, and decoration teams…
feature_two_desc: From guest management to budget tracking and an AI-powered assistant
feature_three_desc: Explore other events and discover unique ideas for your own
referral_text: Invite a friend with a 10% off promo code and get 10% off your next invitation.
privacyPolicy_description: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
privacyPolicy_explanation: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use https://www.allset.am (the “Platform”), including:
privacyPolicy_agreement: By using AllSet, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy_personal_event: Event details (date, location, guest list, etc.)
privacyPolicy_event_guests: Guest names and contact details (if provided)
privacyPolicy_vendor_messages: Messages or inquiries sent to vendors
privacyPolicy_usage_invitations: Enable invitation creation, sharing, and RSVP tracking
privacyPolicy_usage_planning: Support event planning and vendor discovery
privacyPolicy_no_sell: We do not sell your personal data.
privacyPolicy_section3_intro: We may share your data in the following cases:
privacyPolicy_section3_1_text: If you interact with or contact a vendor, relevant information may be shared with them.
privacyPolicy_section3_2_text: We may share data with trusted third parties (e.g., hosting, analytics, email services) to operate the platform.
privacyPolicy_section3_3_text: We may disclose information if required by law or to
privacyPolicy_cookies_note: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not function properly.
privacyPolicy_retention_delete: You may request deletion of your data at any time.
privacyPolicy_security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data. However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacyPolicy_contact_email: To exercise your rights, contact us at: info@allset.am
privacyPolicy_section8_text: Our platform may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., vendors). We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
privacyPolicy_section9_text: AllSet is not intended for individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacyPolicy_section10_text: If you access AllSet from outside Armenia, your data may be processed in other countries where our partners or service providers operate.
privacyPolicy_section11_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last Updated” date.
privacyPolicy_marketing_intro: We may use your personal information to contact you with:
privacyPolicy_marketing_info: Other relevant information about the platform
privacyPolicy_marketing_legal: We will only send such communications where permitted by law.
privacyPolicy_marketing_unsubscribe: You can opt out of marketing communications at any time by:
privacyPolicy_marketing_unsubscribe_li_1: Clicking the “unsubscribe” link in emails, or
privacyPolicy_marketing_notice: Even if you opt out of marketing communications, we may still send essential service-related messages such as
